creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
As ports/129558 has been committed, here's the revised patch.

--

	Hirohisa Yamaguchi
	  umq@ueo.co.jp

-PORTVERSION=	0.8.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.2
 CATEGORIES=	net-im
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.honeyplanet.jp/
